title: Logical Reasoning Path
description: Build fluency in Logical Reasoning inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: speculative reflection
steps.summary: speculative reflection belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Logical Reasoning. Start after reflection. It opens into Speculative Reflection Agent.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Reflection-verification loop

steps.title: Critique-Refine Loops

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
